news.paragraph: UVXY, currently trading around $34.11, is a volatility-tracking ETF, and recent headlines highlight its inverse relationship with market fear. Articles discuss profiting from VIX spikes and how certain leveraged ETFs, like UVXY, are designed to lose value over time, especially in stable or rising markets. Traders considering options on UVXY should be aware of its inherent decay and the potential for sharp, short-term moves driven by market panic or stability.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose
2 Ways To Profit as the VIX Spikes — No Matter What Comes Next
The VIX Spikes as Investors Panic: 3 ETFs to Trade Market Fear Now
